prompt: A mobile inspector robot navigates the factory floor scanning inventory. If battery drops below 20%, it must return to charging station. An AMR collector follows to pick up items, all robots maintain safe distance from humans and other robots. If path blocked, robots must find alternative routes within 30 seconds.
constraints: InspectorBot returns to charging when battery below 20%
InspectorBot finishes scanning then the CollectorAMR starts picking itemns
InspectorBot maintains safe distance from humans
InspectorBot maintains safe distance from robots
CollectorAMR maintains safe distance from humans
CollectorAMR maintains safe distance from robots
Inspector find alternative routes within 30 seconds
CollectorAMR find alternative routes within 30 seconds

results.constraint: InspectorBot returns to charging when battery below 20%
InspectorBot finishes scanning then the CollectorAMR starts picking itemns

results.constraint: InspectorBot maintains safe distance from humans
InspectorBot maintains safe distance from robots
CollectorAMR maintains safe distance from humans

    "query": "A[] (CollectorAMR.distance_from_humans < safe_threshold imply CollectorAMR.maintaining_safe_distance)",

    "pattern_used": "safety_immediate_response",
    "operator_used": ["A[]", "imply"]
}

results.constraint: CollectorAMR maintains safe distance from robots
Inspector find alternative routes within 30 seconds
CollectorAMR find alternative routes within 30 seconds

classification.raw_text:
{ "pattern": "time_bounded_constraint",
  "keywords": ["alternative routes", "within 30 seconds"],
  "cues": ["within", "seconds"],
  "trigger_text": "CollectorAMR must find alternative routes within 30 seconds."
}

generation.raw_text:

    "query": "A[] (CollectorAMR.search_alternative_routes imply clock <= 30)",
    "explanation": "This UPPAAL query enforces that whenever CollectorAMR is searching for alternative routes, it must do so within 30 seconds. The 'imply' operator ensures an immediate response, aligning with the natural language constraint of a time limit.",

    "pattern_used": "time_bounded_constraint",
    "operator_used": ["imply"]
}
